assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters' control plane and node pools will be force-upgraded to 1.31 when 1.30 reaches EoS

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions Extended channel clusters get delayed force-upgrade 'up to 24 months after standard EoS' and have 'most flexibility'

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that legacy 'No channel' clusters will have both control plane and node pools force-upgraded to 1.31 'even if auto-upgrade is disabled per-nodepool'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command example for 'no upgrades' exclusion and explicitly states it's a 'Maximum 30-day deferral' with warning about security debt

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response strongly recommends 'Controlled manual upgrade (recommended)' as Option 1 and provides detailed preparation checklist and rollout sequence

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Cloud Logging or EoS notifications as planning tools - this specific feature is not referenced

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'GKE deprecation insights in console' in the pre-upgrade preparation checklist as a tool for checking deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response warns about 'no upgrades' exclusion accumulating 'security debt' and recommends against waiting, though doesn't use the specific term 'snowflaking'
